description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a natural wood grain finish, featuring visible knots and a slightly weathered appearance. The box has two rectangular cut-out handles on opposite shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The longer sides are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a sturdy and rustic look. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding various items, and the top is completely open with no lid or cover. The wood texture is consistent throughout, and the box appears to be solidly built for practical use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A rustic, open-topped wooden storage box with cut-out side handles and visible wood grain, designed for practical storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat wooden panel with a rectangular cut-out handle centered near the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three horizontal wooden planks forming the longer side, with no handle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, featuring a flat wooden panel with a rectangular cut-out handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three horizontal wooden planks, matching the other long side and lacking a handle.
attribute_handle_design: rectangular cut-out handles on opposite short sides
